ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Mar-16-2026 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-10-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated June 25, 1997, is admitted to probate. Carmel Rafael is appointed as the Executor with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for March 16, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, no appearance is required on that date. Shirley Yawitz is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-04-2024 Continued To Jan-06-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Carmel Rapahel appeared in person (Pro Per) (petitioner).

Discussion was held regarding Ms. Grinberger, that she was a holocaust survivor, that there is a survivor's fund in Germany, and that Mr. Raphael would need letters issued and sent to Germany in order to qualify for the funds. The Court suggests obtaining counsel thru the bar association. Matter is continued to January 6 , 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Santos. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
